title: Audit legacy module dependencies
goal: Produce a dependency map for legacy.py before any deletion or compatibility reduction.

metadata.outcome: Audited dependencies on src/bureau/legacy.py and defined keep/deprecate/remove criteria.

verified_acceptance.import-map: Audit records direct imports, module references, CLI facade references and tests touching legacy.py.
verified_acceptance.state-compatibility: Audit records StateStore tables, run envelopes, receipts and task_status compatibility surfaces.
verified_acceptance.decision-frame: Audit recommends keep for now, deprecate by extraction, and smallest safe helper-extraction follow-up PR.

acceptance.assertion: Audit records imports, re-exports, CLI references and tests that still touch legacy.py.
Audit checks whether existing receipts, envelopes or migration paths require old compatibility.
Audit ends with keep, deprecate or delete criteria and identifies the smallest safe follow-up PR.
